recommendations.rule: sensitivity <1.25 -> EVIDENCE_REQUIRED; sensitivity >=1.25 or adjusted_risk >=55 -> HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED
evidence >=70 and sensitivity <=1.20 -> ALLOW_WITH_WARNING; sensitivity >=1.45 -> HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED
budget <0.25 block/review only; 0.25-0.45 gap mapping; 0.45-0.70 guided reasoning; >0.70 full grounded reasoning
test low 40-55, medium 60-75, high 80-95 evidence before interactive runner
